title: Own-port Fitting UI coherence (improver restyle; automations/monitor audited)

tests.summary: 1416 passed incl. new tests/improver-ui-tokens.test.ts (source + dist token/font parity, dark theme banned)

build.summary: esbuild dist rebuilt; Next app untouched (slice-2 gate build stands)

review.summary: class-name coverage identical (main.tsx untouched); badge tones map to shell pill idiom

codexReview.notes: Round 1: 1 real finding (pending/auto badge text below AA contrast on paper) - applied (darker text #7d5410/#755c14 + soft fills). Round 2: clean approve, contrast verified AA.

codexPwTest.notes: Browser launch blocked in the codex sandbox (established this run), so the independent pass ran at the HTTP level against the LIVE 7088: page HTML + fonts, live stylesheet tokens (dark theme absent, badge fixes present), and /api/queue JSON intact.

designAudit.by: claude vision over live screenshots + walkthrough frames

notes: Improver UI restyled from GitHub-dark to Garrison tokens (kanban-style), fonts wired in index.html, dist rebuilt, live server restarted (old backend predated /api/ecosystem-status). Automations dist (down at audit time) already paper-toned; monitor already on-identity - both logged as coherent, no restyle needed.
